programs.title: East Asia Tonight
programs.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programs.title: Reaching The Unreached S2
programs.desc: The Healthy Kazakhstan train is a 12-carriage mobile hospital that crosses 6,000 km yearly through Kazakhstan, bringing specialist healthcare to remote communities.

programs.title: Singapore Tonight
programs.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programs.title: ROOTS: A Greening Journey
programs.desc: Singapore horticulturists search for new climate proof trees in Latin America, where years ago, the city-state's greening pioneers sourced plants that helped transform the island into a Garden City.

programs.title: Asia Tonight
programs.desc: News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programs.title: Money Mind
programs.desc: How Thailand's fishing crisis could hit consumers' wallets. Safe havens not working as expected – so how should you invest? Young hawker's pricing trap dilemma – can he make it work?
